text:
Every morning dawned beautiful. Rose woke up feeling calm. On this special day, she decided to bake an apple pie for her father. She gathered apples at the orchard, cherries from the mountain, and sugar that smelled like honey. Her hands were gentle as she peeled fruits and chopped wood.

When the pie was baked into a golden crust, she set a plate beside her bed to greet her dad on his journey home. He kissed her cheek. She knew the journey would take some time, and sitting by the fire, she could imagine everything he'd do all day. She hoped he'd tease her about dreaming like a cat, purring all day.

After a couple of hours, she heard his footsteps. Her heart fluttered. He came into the room, smiled, and said, "Good morning, Rose." She giggled. "More pie?"

He nibbled on a slice. "I feel something nice."

She watched him until he settled beside the fire. They sat
